bird.name: Samar crow
bird.summary: The Samar crow (Corvus samarensis), formerly known as the small crow, is a passerine bird in the genus Corvus of the family Corvidae. It is…

locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: Samar crow
relations.evidence: The Samar crow occurs in only one protected area in the Samar Island Natural Park, but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

relations.subject: Samar crow
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and hunting
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Samar crow
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and hunting
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
